VerveQ

Ultimate Multi-Sport Knowledge Challenge

Choose Your Sport

🎯

Quiz Mode

Test your sports knowledge with our comprehensive quiz system. Choose between casual and die-hard difficulty levels.

  • 🎮 Casual Mode - Perfect for all sports fans
  • 🔥 Die-Hard Mode - For true sports experts
  • 📊 Adaptive difficulty system
  • ⚡ Instant feedback and scoring
  • 🏆 Achievement tracking
⚔️

Survival Mode

Two-player competitive battle! Name players based on their initials. Make three mistakes and you're eliminated.

  • ⚔️ Real-time two-player battles
  • 👥 Massive player database
  • 🎯 Fuzzy name matching system
  • 💀 Lives system (3 strikes out)
  • 🏁 Instant winner determination

🏆 View Leaderboard

Check out the top performers and see how you rank against other sports trivia masters

📊 Platform Statistics
